Cognee stores memories as a graph (Kuzu + LanceDB + SQLite). The importer converts nodes to episodic memories and edges to knowledge graph triples."]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13"],["$L14"],"$L15"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@16"]},null,false,"$@16"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L17",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$18",["$L19"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"Ltfl5Op7H3xTONHhYnzyS"}

7:["$","a",null,{"href":"https://www.cognee.ai","children":"Cognee"}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}]
9:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from cognee\n"}]}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}]
b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph nodes"}],": Each Cognee node becomes an episodic memory, enriched with its properties"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Graph edges"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"subject → predicate → object"}]," edges become TripleStore triples"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Node types"}],": Mapped to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]," for multi-agent differentiation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Dataset identity"}],": Cognee dataset ID mapped to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Properties"}],": Node properties merged into Mnemosyne metadata"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Timestamps"}],": Preserved where available"]}],"\n"]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Dry run first to see what will be imported\nhermes mnemosyne import --from cognee --dry-run\n\n# Assign to a specific channel\nhermes mnemosyne import --from cognee --channel-id my-dataset\n\n# Import from a custom data directory\nhermes mnemosyne import --from cognee --data-dir /path/to/cognee/data\n"}]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extraction Method"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["The Cognee importer uses ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get_graph_data()"}]," to pull the full graph — nodes become episodic memories, edges become triples. The graph structure is preserved so no information is lost."]}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Cognee Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Node content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Node type"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Node properties"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Edge (subject → predicate → object)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"triple_add(subject, predicate, object)"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dataset ID"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
13:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import import_from_cognee\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nresult = import_from_cognee(\n    mnemosyne=mnemosyne,\n    data_dir=\"/path/to/cognee/data\",   # optional\n    channel_id=\"my-dataset\",            # optional\n    dry_run=True,                       # try True first\n)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\nprint(f\"Nodes: {result.nodes}, Edges: {result.edges}\")\n"}]}]
